---
description: "Use when researching, scaffolding, parsing, normalizing, testing, or documenting game telemetry adapters such as F1 25, ACC, AMS2, or LMU."
applyTo:
  - "src/SectorForge.Collector/Adapters/**/*.cs"
  - "tests/SectorForge.Protocol.Tests/**/*.cs"
  - "docs/protocol-notes.md"
  - "docs/game-adapters.md"
---
# SectorForge Protocol Adapter Instructions

- Do not copy vendor protocol documents, packet tables, or proprietary telemetry captures into the repo.
- Link to public documentation from docs when needed, and summarize implementation decisions in original words.
- Keep raw DTOs, byte parsing, shared memory structs, and plugin-specific logic isolated from `SectorForge.Core`.
- Normalize unavailable values to `null`; do not invent data just to fill the model.
- Add parser tests with small synthetic fixtures or generated byte arrays.
- Keep real adapters opt-in until configuration, tests, and error handling are solid.
- Surface adapter failures through collector status instead of crashing the API process.
